value: positionGroupShareData() accepts optional portfolioPositions parameter. For closing trades where opening fills aren't in allGroups (multi-day trades), it falls back to portfolio position data: entry price from leg.avg_cost, entry time from position.entry_date. This ensures share cards display ENTRY/EXIT data even when the position was opened on a prior day. Times are formatted in PST via fmtTimePST() in the API route.
